TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_syulan

S.FORM: yau kenanem sunis aytu wasu usiq wasu qmudu tu biyat.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩和一隻狗養了一隻青蛙。
There were a child and a dog that kept a frog.

S.FORM: nani yau tmita tu biyat.
S.TRANSL: 他看青蛙。
He looked at the frog.

S.FORM: temengu maynep ti sunis aytu wasu.
S.TRANSL: 結果，小孩和狗睡覺了。
And then the child and the dog fell asleep.

S.FORM: mRaRiw ti biyat ‘nay nizi ta buduqan.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙從瓶子裡跑了出來。
The frog ran out of the bottle.

S.FORM: masuat sunis ‘nay aytu wasu ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗起床。
The child and that dog woke up.

S.FORM: mai ti biyat ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙不見了。
The frog was gone.

S.FORM: nani kikiliman na sunis ‘nay aytu wasu ‘nay biyat.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗找那個青蛙。
The child and the dog looked for the frog.

S.FORM: kiliman na sunis ‘nay ta kuzuan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩找鞋子裡面。
The child searched the shoes.

S.FORM: timengu pasusuRanna na wasu ‘nay uRuna pasazi ta buduqan nani.
S.TRANSL: 結果，那隻狗把它的頭放到瓶子裡。
And then that dog put his head into the bottle.

S.FORM: Rayngu ti ala ‘nay uRuna tabuduqan ma.
S.TRANSL: 牠無法把牠的頭從瓶子裡拉出來。
It couldn’t pull its head out of the bottle.

S.FORM: maqawit ti ta buduqan.
S.TRANSL: (牠的頭)被卡在瓶子裡。
(It was) stuck inside the bottle.

S.FORM: nani bedunganna ti sunis‘nay buduq ‘nay kawka ma ala uRuna wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子被那個小孩打破，他的狗的頭才被拿出來。
The bottle was broken by that child, and then the head of the dog was taken out.

S.FORM: nani matiw ti sa naung kmilim wi qmeRas tu biyat ‘nay sa naung.
S.TRANSL: 他們去山上繼續找，在山上喊那個青蛙。
They went to the mountain and kept searching, and they called to that frog in the mountain.

S.FORM: qeqeRas zana.
S.TRANSL: 繼續喊。
(They) kept calling.

S.FORM: nani ma titaanna ti usiq ‘nay eh usiq tangan tangan na na mutun.
S.TRANSL: 他看到一個老鼠的洞。
He saw a hole of mouse.

S.FORM: yau wasu ‘nay titaanna ‘nay ta ta paRinan 'nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗在樹那邊看。
The dog saw (something) at a tree over there.

S.FORM: tapaRinan ‘nay e.
S.TRANSL: 在樹那邊。
At the tree.

S.FORM: nake zeme jiang wangji le.
S.TRANSL: 那個怎麼講忘記了。
I forget how to say that.

S.FORM: mai mai biyat ‘nay pakalaanna.
S.TRANSL: 沒有找到青蛙。
The frog was not found.

S.FORM: nani mzaqis ti sunis ‘nay pasazui ta paRinan.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩爬上那棵樹。
The child climbed up the tree.

S.FORM: yau tangan na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 那邊有樹的洞。
There was a tree hole.

S.FORM: mai qaya biyat ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙也不在。
The frog was not there, either.

S.FORM: temengu tateRaq na paRin yau e adam.
S.TRANSL: 然後，在樹裡面有一隻鳥。
And then, there was a bird inside the tree.

S.FORM: muRetut sunis ‘nay tmibuq ti tapaRinan nizi tapaRinan sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩被嚇到然後從樹上掉下來。
The child was frightened and fell off the tree.

S.FORM: temengu e tanuzanna penay ‘nay wasu ‘nay wi tanuzanna.
S.TRANSL: 然後，蜜峰繼續追那個狗。
And then, the bees continued chasing the dog.

S.FORM: wi mRaRiw wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗繼續跑。
The dog kept running.

S.FORM: adam ‘nay nani tanuzan na sunis‘nay qaya.
S.TRANSL: 那個鳥繼續追那個小孩。
The bird continued chasing that child.

S.FORM: mzaqis ti tu betu sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩也爬到石頭上。
The child also climbed up to the rock.

S.FORM: temengu tatuRuz na betu yau ‘nay sizi.
S.TRANSL: 結果，有一隻羊在石頭後面。
And then, there was a goat behind the rock.

S.FORM: qapaR zana sunis ‘nay ‘nay si waki na sizi ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩抓著它，那個羊的角。
The child held it, the horn of the goat.

S.FORM: tayan qmeRas tu kmilim tu biyatna nani.
S.TRANSL: 在那邊喊他的青蛙。
He called and looked for his frog there.

S.FORM: Raynguanna tu sizi ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道那個羊在那裡。
He didn’t know that the goat was there.

S.FORM: temengu masuat sizi ‘nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 結果，羊起來。
And then, the goat got up.

S.FORM: baksiwanna ta iRebengan.
S.TRANSL: 然後，它把他丟到深的河裡面。
It threw him into the deep river.

S.FORM: ‘nay iRuR aytu wasu ‘nay nizanna kinawsa baksiw.
S.TRANSL: 它丟那個狗和全部。他丟兩個。
It threw them, both the dog and the child.

S.FORM: nani mnanguy ti sunis ‘nay aytu wasu ‘nay pasa qazqaz.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗游往河岸。
The child and the dog swam to the shore.

S.FORM: timengu ti ta na tatuRuz na paRin yau.
S.TRANSL: 結果，在樹的後面有…
And then, at the back of the tree there were...

S.FORM: qalimetka qalimetka zin na sunis ‘nay tu wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩對著狗說：「安靜！安靜！」。
The child said to the dog, ‘Be quiet! Be quiet!’

S.FORM: yau ‘nay biyat ‘nay tatuRus na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙在樹的後面。
Behind the tree, there was the frog.

S.FORM: e nanapaw kinawsa yau upitu sunis na biyat ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有一對夫婦和青蛙的七個小孩。
There were husband and wife and seven children of frogs.

S.FORM: nani titaanna ‘nay nanapaw tam tinana tamana na biyat ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 他看到夫婦，青蛙的媽媽和爸爸。
He saw the husband and wife,… the mother and the father of the frogs.

S.FORM: sunis zau ngid iku tu qudu tu usiq biyat zinna titaanna mlizaq tu biyat nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩想：「我要一隻青蛙」。他看到而且喜歡那個青蛙。
‘I want to keep one frog,’ thought the child. He saw and liked the frog.

S.FORM: bulaanna ti tamana tinana tu usiq tu sunis ‘nay sapatananansu zinna.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙爸爸和媽媽把一隻青蛙送給那小孩:「給你帶回家。」
The father and mother gave one frog to that child. ‘One for you to bring home.’

S.FORM: nani wanay xiexieni wanay zin na tina na sunis ‘nay tu tama tamana tinana.
S.TRANSL: 「謝謝你。」那個小孩謝謝它的爸爸和媽媽。
‘Thank you,' the child said to its father and mother.
